sondermaschinenbau.title: Special Machine Construction
sondermaschinenbau.summary: From consulting through design to commissioning – we develop and manufacture customer-specific special machines for almost all industries. Everything out of one hand.

verpackungsmaschinen.title: Packaging Machines
verpackungsmaschinen.tagline: Tubular bag packaging for every product
verpackungsmaschinen.summary: We manufacture suitable packaging machines to your specifications – vertical or horizontal, with extensive accessories for complete process integration.

retrofit.title: Retrofit

steuerungsbau.title: Control Engineering

dienstleistungenMechanik.title: Mechanical Services

dienstleistungenElektrik.title: Electrical Services
dienstleistungenElektrik.summary: No in-house electrical department? We handle wiring, electrical design and documentation – also for EPLAN Electric P8.

contact.heading: Interested?
contact.subtitle: We are happy to advise you on this service area.

retrofit.flowText: Do you have a machine that is mechanically still robust and reliable, but its processes are outdated or it no longer complies with current EU machinery directives? Buying a new one is too expensive? We specifically modernize your existing system – for greater efficiency, reproducibility, and safety. A retrofit saves costs and significantly extends the life of your investment.

sections.heading: What we modernize
items: Mechanical overhaul and optimization of system components
Renewal / replacement of discontinued parts and assemblies
New control system (PLC, HMI, safety relays)
Adaptation to current EU machinery directives and safety standards
Automation of manual process steps
New painting and visual refurbishment
Complete documentation of the executed modifications

special-machinery.flowText: Every task you have receives an individual special solution from us – whether machine or fixture, assembly or testing station. From initial consultation through design, parts manufacturing and assembly to programming, commissioning and training: everything out of one hand.

sections.heading: Our Target Industries
items: Automotive industry & suppliers: Assembly machines, leak testing systems, lubrication systems, optical/electronic/mechanical test fixtures, endurance testing machines, functional test fixtures, welding fixtures
Mechanical engineering: Machine components, controls, fixtures
Aluminum die casting plants: Infeed and outfeed systems, leak testing systems, assembly machines, special machining tools, engraving automats
Plastic injection molding plants: Infeed and outfeed systems, singulation systems, packaging machines, conveyor belts, gantry robots, testing and measuring technology
Gas spring & damper manufacturers: Assembly fixtures, pressure intensifiers / pressure boosters, gas spring filling systems
Textile industry: Assembly and auxiliary fixtures, special machines, packaging machines
Electronics industry: Endurance and functional testing fixtures, assembly fixtures
Parts manufacturers: Infeed and outfeed systems, gantry robots, multi-axis robots, singulation systems, testing and measuring fixtures, clamping fixtures
Assembly plants: Ergonomic workplaces, auxiliary and assembly fixtures

sections.heading: Service Portfolio at a Glance
items: Assembly machines & systems
Leak testing machines
Machining solutions
Engraving automats
Singulation systems
Infeed and outfeed systems
Measuring and testing stations
Optical sorting, measuring & test technology
Conveyor technology
Assembly fixtures
Endurance test fixtures
Ergonomic workplace systems
Tubular bag packaging machines
Machines for damper & gas spring production
Welding fixtures
Pressure intensifiers / pressure boosters
Filling machines
Oil dosing devices

packaging-machines.flowText: Would you like to package your product? We build a customized tubular bag packaging machine for you – perfectly matched to your product, your process, and your production line. We offer two basic types (vertical & horizontal) that can be individually configured and expanded with comprehensive accessories. You describe the task to us – we deliver the solution.

sections.heading: Machine Types
items: Vertical tubular bag packaging machines: for light to mid-weight packaging goods (up to approx. 500 g), granular products, as well as small to medium-sized parts (longest side up to approx. 150-200 mm)
Horizontal tubular bag packaging machines: for light to heavy as well as small to bulky products

sections.heading: Accessories & Extensions
items: Packing / sorting tables
Header application machines
Conveyor belts for product infeed and outfeed
Singulation systems
Weighing and counting automats
Marking / labeling systems
Retrofit of packaging machines
Repair / Assembly / Service

control-engineering.flowText: A complete machine is not always required – sometimes it is enough to renew or rebuild the control technical part. Whether electrics, pneumatics, visualization or drive technology: We plan, build, and program the suitable control for your plant – from a simple control panel to a complex multi-axis control. Get in touch with us.

sections.heading: Scope of Services Control Engineering
items: Design of electrical, mechanical and pneumatic control components
Control cabinet construction according to customer specifications or in-house planning
PLC programming (Siemens S7, TIA Portal, Beckhoff TwinCAT, etc.)
Visualization and operating terminals (HMI)
On-site commissioning
Frequency inverters, servo technology and drive technology
Fieldbuses and networks (PROFIBUS, PROFINET, EtherCAT)

mechanical-services.flowText: Our team has many years of experience in mechanical design and assembly. Whether you need design support, finished drawings, or complete subassembly mounting – we are your competent partner and take over exactly as much or as little as you need.

sections.heading: Our Mechanical Services
items: Development and design of machines, fixtures, and tools
CAD design in 2D and 3D (motion simulation, collision check)
Stress analysis and strength calculation
Creation of production-ready drawings, bills of materials, and order lists
Parts procurement from proven suppliers
Mechanical repair and assembly
Manufacturing and assembly of machines, fixtures, and tools according to customer documents

electrical-services.flowText: No in-house electrical department or capacity bottlenecks in control engineering? No problem – we take over the electrical services for you: from wiring through design to seamless documentation. The digitization of paper plans and the maintenance of existing EPLAN projects are also part of our offering.

sections.heading: Our Electrical Services
items: Electrical wiring of control cabinets and machines according to customer documents
Electrical design by our cooperation partners
Creation of bills of materials, article, and order lists
Digitization of paper plans in EPLAN Electric P8
Subsequent documentation of changes and extensions in existing plans
Repair and service of contactor controls

about.heading: About
about.subtitle: We are a company specializing in automation and special machine construction, headquartered in
about.subtitleEnd: Through many years of experience and manageable structures, high quality, flexibility and reliability are always included in our projects.
about.claimText: From design and engineering through assembly to commissioning: We deliver every complete solution to your wishes. Whether CAD drawings, electrical plans, electrics or programming – at Heinze Automatisierungstechnik you get everything out of one hand.

footer.tagline: Your competent partner for automation, assembly and process systems. Everything out of one hand – from design to commissioning.
